zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hartlington於1435年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯吉普頓 奧 斯瓦爾時，她的父親William Hartlington32歲，母親Isabel Dalton Stanley23歲。她於1455年與Thomas Metcalfe在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年在英國英格蘭越可爾納帕享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hartlington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hardington
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Hartington   with the voicing of /t/ to /d/ between a voiced consonant and a vowel.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hartlington was born in 1435, in Skipton on Swale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Hartlington, was 32 and her mother, Isabel Dalton Stanley, was 23. She married Thomas Metcalfe in 1455, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1476, in Nappa, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hartlington est née en 1435, à Skipton on Swale, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Hartlington, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel Dalton Stanley, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Metcalfe en 1455, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1476, à Nappa, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hartlingtonが1435年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトン オン スワルで生まれた時，父William Hartlingtonは32歳，母Isabel Dalton Stanleyは23歳であった。1455年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでThomas Metcalfeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1476年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアナッパで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hartlington(이)가 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스키프턴  스월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Hartlington(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Dalton Stanley(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Thomas Metcalfe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 나파에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hartlington родилась в 1435 г. в местности скиптон он свеил, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Hartlington было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Dalton Stanley, 23.
